{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Netherworld
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] mentions the [[Netherworld]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Netherclaw]] is named after a beast that guards the [[Netherworld]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
